square70x70logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 70 70'><circle cx='35' cy='35' r='32' fill='%235de0a8'/><circle cx='35' cy='35' r='30' fill='%230e0e11'/><text x='35' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='20' fill='%235de0a8' font-family='system-ui' font-weight='bold'>TW</text></svg>

square150x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 150 150'><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='70' fill='%235de0a8'/><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='65' fill='%230e0e11'/><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='60' fill='%235de0a8'/><text x='75' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='50' fill='%230e0e11' font-family='system-ui' font-weight='bold'>TW</text></svg>

square310x310logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 310'><circle cx='155' cy='155' r='145' fill='%235de0a8'/><circle cx='155' cy='155' r='135' fill='%230e0e11'/><circle cx='155' cy='155' r='130' fill='%235de0a8'/><text x='155' y='215' text-anchor='middle' font-size='100' fill='%230e0e11' font-family='system-ui' font-weight='bold'>TW</text></svg>

wide310x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 150'><rect width='310' height='150' fill='%235de0a8'/><text x='155' y='100' text-anchor='middle' font-size='60' fill='%230e0e11' font-family='system-ui' font-weight='bold'>Tempow</text></svg>
